content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Antifection
description: A Vladof area grenade that blankets the impact zone with a rotating ring of fire and outward-flying rockets. It is strongest against unshielded crowds, especially flesh targets that stay on the ground, and fills a similar role to the Fire Bee.
notes:
An unused second variant exists with the same item card but without the extra flame spawns, and it is not obtainable through normal play.

The red text references Ragnaros from Warcraft, and the rocket impacts use a smaller version of the Nukem explosion. It can also damage allies through friendly fire.

special.description: Always incendiary. Creates a rotating ring of flame and launches explosive fire rockets in every direction, with each rocket detonating on impact.
special.title: By fire be purged!
